gaps: ADR-015 / SAD Â§2.2.3: Luhn algorithm specifies doubling 'odd positions (1-indexed)' from right to left. Standard Luhn doubles even positions (skip the check digit). Verified: 4111111111111111 yields sum=27 (fail) with odd-position doubling, sum=30 (pass) with even-position doubling. This would cause valid credit cards to fail validation at implementation time.

SAB key_decisions numbering diverges from ADR document: SAB assigns ADR-013â†’embedding model, ADR-015â†’RRF, ADR-018â†’Luhn, etc., while the ADR document assigns ADR-013â†’adapters, ADR-015â†’Luhn, ADR-018â†’RRF, etc. The SAB ordering was likely frozen before the ADR document was renumbered. Update SAB to match ADR document numbering.

SAB key_decisions omits ADR-021 (Grounding Checks Cosine Similarity), ADR-022 (Prometheus Metrics Library), ADR-023 (pgvector ivfflat Index), and ADR-024 (Golden Dataset Schema). Add these four decisions to the SAB block.

Upstream B-2 Gap 1 (SAB circular pipelineâ†”knowledge allowed_dependencies) not corrected. The SAB still lists 'pipeline' in knowledge's allowed_dependencies and 'knowledge' in pipeline's. Only knowledgeâ†’pipeline exists in the actual module graph.

Upstream B-2 Gap 2 (SAD Â§1.1 overview lists GroundingChecker L5 inline with sanitizer/PII-masker as if it operates on user messages, but it operates on LLM outputs per ADR-021 and data flow 5.3) not corrected. The overview text is misleading for implementers.
